BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Apex methods may be reachable through network-invoked flows (e.g., controllers/services) in typical org usage.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: If a reference to an internal mutable array is returned, the caller can mutate it without complex steps.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Requires access to invoke the method (usually an authenticated context).

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: No user interaction required once the method is reachable.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Impact remains in the same application scope.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Internal state exposed via arrays may reveal sensitive values.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Mutating internal arrays can corrupt application state/logic and stored data decisions.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Easily demonstrated by returning a reference and mutating it from caller code.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Defensive copying is a standard, well-documented mitigation.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: CWE-375 pattern is well-understood and detectable.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Apex methods may be reachable through network-invoked flows (e.g., controllers/services) in typical org usage..

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: If a reference to an internal mutable array is returned, the caller can mutate it without complex steps.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Requires access to invoke the method (usually an authenticated context).

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No user interaction required once the method is reachable.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Impact remains in the same application scope.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Internal state exposed via arrays may reveal sensitive values.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Mutating internal arrays can corrupt application state/logic and stored data decisions.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Internal state exposure is high risk in many orgs.
